arts.sum: After 132 years at their beloved Goodison Park, Everton will have a new home next season. The new 'Everton Stadium' on the Bramley-Moore Dock is set to be the home ground for the Toffees from...

arts.ttl: Jordan Pickford battling ‘best in Europe’ as four Everton teammates go head-to-head in vote
arts.sum: It hasn't been the best year for the Toffees, but there have still been some shining lights at Goodison Park in 2024 - and you can now vote for your Fans' Footballer of the Year

arts.ttl: Club’s move for Everton man depends on key factor – Indication that ‘Friedkins would play at home’
arts.sum: For many weeks, Everton’s Beto has been a major figure in the Italian rumour mill ahead of January. Yesterday, the Portuguese striker was linked with a move to Torino, who have apparently already started making moves for Beto. arts.ttl: Sean Dyche accepts responsibility for Everton's woeful form and admits he's 'made errors this season' - with the Toffees just two points above the drop zone
arts.sum: Sean Dyche has admitted he has made mistakes this season as he laid bare the bleak situation confronting Everton in the months ahead.

arts.ttl: Report: What Ruben Amorim has privately told Manchester United's board about Jarrad Branthwaite
Everton manager 'list' highlights Friedkin takeover dilemma after Sean Dyche admission
arts.sum: As Sean Dyche prepares for a hugely-important game with Wolverhampton Wanderers, Chris Beesley acknowledges this season has been poor but is left uninspired by a bookmakers' list of potential next Everton managers

arts.ttl: Sean Dyche insists he's still trying to give Everton supporters season they want after budget cut
arts.sum: Sean Dyche insists he's trying to give Everton supporters the season they want for Goodison Park's historic final campaign - even if his job is harder

arts.ttl: Man Utd transfer news: Ruben Amorim adds new target to wishlist amid Andre Onana stance
arts.sum: Manchester United are among those considering a move for Napoli goalkeeper Alex Meret, who will find himself out of contract in the summer, with Inter Milan also keen

arts.ttl: Sean Dyche denies Dominic Calvert-Lewin Everton fight as he admits new Dele Alli blow
arts.sum: Sean Dyche has denied that he had a bust-up with Everton striker Dominic Calvert-Lewin but admitted Dele Alli has suffered another fitness setback

arts.ttl: Newcastle and Everton could be trickier games than City and Madrid, warns Slot
arts.sum: Liverpool face two trips in wake of high-profile victories Slot jokes about charges levelled at Pep Guardiola’s club Arne Slot believes Liverpool’s imperious form has made them a bigger target for Premier League rivals and that trips to Newcastle and Everton could be more problematic than the statement wins against Real Madrid and Manchester City. The Liverpool’s head coach says it was not difficult for his team to show their prowess in beating the champions of Europe last week, and of England at Anfield on Sunday. The challenge now is to repeat those performances at St James’ Park on Wednesday and in Slot’s first Merseyside derby at Goodison Park on Saturday. He says Liverpool’s mentality on the road will be just as important as their ability. Continue reading...
